Tier: 3

16. Modules

Tier-3 fixture; every module already exists in the repo. T3 must Recommend Run regardless of upgrade detection.

namedepsrole
spec(none)Existing skill.
architecturespecExisting skill.
verifyarchitectureExisting skill.

17. Architectural assertions

  • Spec module must not import directly from verify (layering invariant).
  • Architecture findings must be advisory at Phase 6.6 (D11).
